title: Professor Pixel's Vacation (Capstone)
drDigitalIntro: Congratulations! You've completed 12 units of learning. Now it's time for the final capstone — Professor Pixel is leaving for vacation and needs your help preparing everything. This simulation ties together almost everything you've learned: connecting to Wi-Fi, browsing Safari, finding websites, signing in with saved passwords, checking weather, downloading files, managing files and folders, sending email, using Messages, organizing information, checking settings, staying safe online, and troubleshooting. By the end, you'll have helped Professor Pixel prepare completely for their trip. This is your graduation ceremony — you'll see how all the skills work together in realistic scenarios.
drDigitalSuccess: You're a computer expert! Congratulations on completing LearnAComputer. You now have the knowledge to use your Mac confidently in daily life. The internet is full of tutorials if you ever need to learn something new. You've got this! 🎓
drDigitalHint: This comprehensive challenge exercises everything you've learned. Take your time, apply each skill, and celebrate your achievement!
